channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran seizes ships in strait after Trump halts attacks
item.description:
Importance: 102.3 | Covered by: 10 feeds | Reputation: 4.7

Matched titles:
- Iranian forces seize two ships in strait of Hormuz amid doubts over further peace talks with US
- Iran seizes ships after Trump declares indefinite truce
- Iran seizes two ships in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran seizes ships in Hormuz after Trump halts attacks
- Tehran Says It Has Seized Two Ships in Strait of Hormuz After Cease-Fire Extended
- Strait of Hormuz is hosting gunboat diplomacy as US and Iran vie for most effective blockade
- India-bound ship among two vessels ‘seized’ by Iran Guards in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran fires on 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz as US maintains blockade and diplomacy stalls
- Iran says seizes two container ships attempting to exit Gulf
- Three ships targeted in Hormuz, Iran seizes two
- Strait of Hormuz Dangers Escalate as Iran Says It Seized 2 Cargo Ships
- Iran War Live Updates: At Least 2 Ships Are Attacked Amid Uncertainty Over Talks
- Attacks and ship seizures in Strait of Hormuz imperil talks to end Iran war
- Middle East on edge again: Two ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz
- Three ships targeted in Hormuz, Iran seizes two: monitors, Guards
- 34 Iran-linked tankers slipped past US Hormuz blockade: Report
- Iran opens fire on container ship in Strait of Hormuz, raising regional tensions
- Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz
- Iran seizes 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump halts attacks
- Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz

- Iran’s Revolutionary Guard attacks third ship in Strait of Hormuz, seizes two vessels
- Iran opens fire on container ship in Strait of Hormuz, raising regional tensions
- Gulf worries US-Iran talks may cement Tehran's 'golden' grip on Hormuz
